faq.boundaries1.a: No educational resource can guarantee examination results or clinical performance. NurseNest supports learning and reasoning development, but outcomes depend on many individual factors.
faq.boundaries1.q: Does NurseNest guarantee exam success or clinical outcomes?
faq.boundaries2.a: NurseNest is intended to complement, not replace, accredited education, clinical mentorship, institutional policy, and regulatory standards.
faq.boundaries2.q: How should NurseNest be used alongside formal education?
faq.content1.a: NurseNest emphasizes mechanistic understanding, physiological reasoning, and clinical cognition. Rather than presenting isolated facts, lessons explain why clinical findings occur, how compensatory mechanisms operate, and how exam questions test decision-making under uncertainty.
faq.content1.q: What makes NurseNest different from other study platforms?
faq.content2.a: Yes. NurseNest supports all major nursing licensure examinations, including NCLEX-RN, NCLEX-PN, REX-PN, and NP certification exams (ANCC, AANP). Whether you're preparing for your RPN/LVN, RN, or Nurse Practitioner licensing exam in Canada or the United States, NurseNest has you covered. Use the region toggle to switch between Canadian and US guidelines, lab values, terminology, and scope-of-practice standards. Core physiological principles remain consistent across regions.
faq.content2.q: Is content tailored for Canadian and American learners?
faq.content3.a: No. NurseNest provides independently developed, original educational content intended solely for learning and exam preparation purposes. NurseNest is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or representative of NCLEX, NCSBN, or any regulatory or examination authority. NurseNest questions are original educational materials designed to support knowledge development and clinical reasoning. They do not reproduce, replicate, or represent actual licensing examination content and should not be interpreted as predictive of examination outcomes.
faq.content3.q: Are NurseNest questions identical to NCLEX or licensing examinations?
faq.content4.a: Yes. Every quiz question includes detailed rationales that explain the correct answer and why incorrect options are wrong, emphasizing clinical reasoning over memorization.
faq.content5.a: Yes. Each lesson includes a built-in note-taking panel that auto-saves your work. You can view and print all your notes from your profile.
faq.content5.q: Can I take notes during lessons?
faq.content6.a: Yes. Each lesson includes a 25-question pre-test to assess baseline knowledge and a 25-question post-test to measure improvement after studying. Scores are tracked on your performance dashboard.
faq.exam1.a: Yes. NurseNest is designed to support learners preparing for nursing licensure examinations including the NCLEX-RN, NCLEX-PN, and REX-PN. Content is structured around clinical reasoning, prioritization, and safety logic: the cognitive patterns these exams test. NurseNest is an independent educational resource and is not affiliated with NCSBN or any regulatory body.
faq.exam1.q: Can I use NurseNest to prepare for the NCLEX or REX-PN?
faq.exam2.a: NCLEX (National Council Licensure Examination) is the licensing exam used in the United States and some Canadian jurisdictions. REX-PN (Regulatory Exam for Practical Nurses) is the entry-to-practice exam for practical nurses in Canadian provinces that have adopted it. Both exams test clinical reasoning and safe nursing practice, but differ in format and jurisdiction. NurseNest supports preparation for both.
faq.exam2.q: What is the difference between NCLEX and REX-PN?
faq.exam3.a: NurseNest's clinical case simulations, branching decision scenarios, and clinical judgment exercises are designed to build the reasoning skills tested by modern exam formats, including the clinical judgment measurement model. Our question bank includes extended scenarios that require analysis across multiple data points, consistent with contemporary examination approaches.
faq.exam3.q: Does NurseNest cover Next Generation NCLEX (NGN) question styles?
faq.exam4.a: NurseNest questions are independently authored by nursing educators and structured to reflect the cognitive complexity, clinical reasoning depth, and safety-focused thinking patterns tested on licensure exams. They are original educational content: not reproductions of actual exam items: and are designed to develop the same clinical judgment skills that exams assess.
faq.exam4.q: Are NurseNest questions realistic compared to actual exam questions?
faq.exam5.a: Absolutely. Many students use NurseNest alongside their nursing courses to deepen their understanding of pathophysiology, pharmacology, and clinical reasoning. The platform is structured from foundational concepts through advanced clinical analysis, making it useful from first semester through exam preparation.
faq.exam5.q: Can I use NurseNest while still in nursing school?
faq.exam6.a: Traditional question banks focus on repetition and answer memorization. NurseNest combines detailed pathophysiology lessons, mechanism-based rationales, interactive case simulations, clinical skill labs, and performance analytics into an integrated learning system. The goal is to teach you how to think through clinical problems, not just recall answers.
faq.exam6.q: How is NurseNest different from a traditional question bank?
faq.footerText: For more information, please review our
faq.general1.a: NurseNest is a clinical learning platform designed to strengthen nursing knowledge, clinical reasoning, and exam preparedness. Unlike traditional study resources that emphasize memorization, NurseNest focuses on mechanisms, physiological logic, and decision-making frameworks used in real clinical environments and licensing examinations.
faq.general2.a: NurseNest is designed for nursing students, exam candidates, and practicing nurses seeking deeper conceptual understanding. Content is structured to support learners across RPN, RN, and NP levels, with emphasis on clinical thinking rather than isolated fact recall.
faq.general3.a: No. NurseNest is a supplementary educational resource intended to support formal education and professional development. It does not replace accredited nursing programs, clinical placements, institutional instruction, or regulatory training requirements.
faq.general3.q: Is NurseNest a replacement for nursing school or clinical training?
faq.general4.a: Yes. Educational material is developed using widely accepted physiological principles, established clinical frameworks, and contemporary practice standards. NurseNest is an educational platform, not a clinical authority, and learners should always follow institutional policies, regulatory standards, and employer-specific protocols.
faq.general5.a: No. All content is provided for educational purposes only. NurseNest does not offer medical diagnoses, treatment recommendations, or patient-specific guidance. Clinical decisions must always be based on professional judgment, institutional policies, and licensed provider direction.
faq.general5.q: Does NurseNest provide medical or clinical advice?
faq.pageSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about NurseNest, our content, subscriptions, and more.
faq.pricing1.a: Pricing varies by access tier and duration. Options include monthly, 3-month, 6-month, and yearly plans, as well as limited trial passes. Current subscription options are listed on our pricing page.
faq.pricing2.a: Subscriptions provide access to premium learning tools, including advanced pathophysiology lessons, clinical reasoning modules, exam-style questions, flashcards, note-taking, and progress tracking depending on the selected tier.
faq.pricing3.a: Yes. Users may upgrade or modify their subscription based on platform availability and billing cycle rules.
faq.pricing3.q: Can I switch between subscription tiers?
faq.pricing4.a: NurseNest offers free Anatomy & Physiology content and may offer limited-access passes at certain times. Availability and terms may change without notice.
faq.pricing5.a: Yes. Subscriptions may be cancelled at any time. Access remains active until the end of the billing period. NurseNest does not provide partial-period refunds unless required by applicable consumer protection laws.
faq.pricing6.a: Due to the digital nature of the platform, subscription fees are generally non-refundable once access is granted. First-time subscribers are covered by a 30-day money-back guarantee. Exceptions may apply where legally required.
faq.pricing7.a: Payments are processed securely through Stripe. Accepted payment methods include major credit and debit cards.
faq.pricing8.a: Yes. All subscriptions auto-renew at the end of each billing period. You will receive a reminder email before renewal so you can cancel if you wish. You can manage your subscription from your profile at any time.
faq.technical1.a: Yes. The platform is fully responsive and works on phones, tablets, and computers with modern browsers.
faq.technical1.q: Can NurseNest be used on mobile devices?
faq.technical2.a: No. NurseNest content is protected intellectual property. Downloading, copying, sharing, or redistributing materials without authorization is prohibited and may result in account termination.
faq.technical2.q: Can I download or redistribute content?
faq.technical3.a: Yes. NurseNest uses industry-standard security practices and secure payment processing through Stripe. Users are responsible for maintaining their own account credentials.

home.faq.a10: はい。NurseNestのすべてのコンテンツは臨床と教育の専門知識を持つ看護専門家によって開発・レビューされています。
home.faq.a2: NurseNestの問題は看護免許試験でテストされる臨床推論と認知パターンを反映するように設計されています。
home.faq.a3: もちろんです。多くの看護学生が病態生理学、薬理学、臨床推論スキルを強化するためにNurseNestを使用しています。
home.faq.a4: 従来の問題集は問題、4つの選択肢、正解を提供します。NurseNestは正解が正しい理由と各選択肢が不正解な理由を説明する詳細な解説を提供します。
home.faq.a5: はい。NurseNestはNCLEX-RN、NCLEX-PN、REX-PN、NP認定試験を含むすべての主要な免許試験の準備をサポートします。
home.faq.a6: 無料プランにはプレナーシング基礎モジュール、インタラクティブな解剖学・生理学図、臨床明確性の説明、最大50枚のフラッシュカードが含まれます。
home.faq.a6b: 学習モードは間隔反復を使用して各カードの習得を助けます。テストモードは最後に詳細な成績表がある時間制限付き評価です。
home.faq.a7: はい。すべてのサブスクリプションはプロフィールページからいつでもキャンセルできます。
home.faq.a8: はい。NurseNestにはケーススタディや臨床判断シナリオを含む次世代試験でテストされる認知パターンを反映した問題形式が含まれています。
home.faq.a9suffix: 問以上の練習問題を提供し、すべての主要な看護コンテンツ領域をカバーしています。毎週新しい問題が追加されます。

home.flashcardTrust.benefit1: Every card is validated against current clinical practice guidelines, pharmacology references, and evidence-based nursing standards before publication
home.flashcardTrust.benefit2: Drug dosages, lab ranges, and clinical parameters are cross-referenced with authoritative sources to ensure accuracy down to the decimal
home.flashcardTrust.benefit3: Content is structured around exam-relevant domains - you study what licensing boards actually test, not random trivia from unverified sources
home.flashcardTrust.benefit4: Built-in accuracy scoring flags cards that need review, so the platform self-corrects and improves continuously based on clinical updates
home.flashcardTrust.ctaDesc: Stop gambling with unverified flashcards. Every NurseNest deck is built on validated clinical content, verified against current practice guidelines and peer-reviewed literature. Study with confidence knowing the information you are committing to memory is accurate, current, and exam-ready.
home.flashcardTrust.ctaTitle: Your Exam Prep Deserves Verified Content
home.flashcardTrust.heading: Not All Flashcards Are Created Equal
home.flashcardTrust.issue1: User-generated content with no clinical review - anyone can publish a deck, regardless of accuracy or qualifications
home.flashcardTrust.issue2: Outdated pharmacology and incorrect dosage ranges that reflect superseded guidelines or student misunderstandings
home.flashcardTrust.issue3: No source citations or evidence grading - you have no way to verify if a card is based on current clinical evidence
home.flashcardTrust.issue4: Errors compound silently: students memorize wrong answers, share decks, and misinformation spreads across cohorts unchecked
home.flashcardTrust.subtitle: Most flashcard platforms let anyone upload content with zero quality control. That means the cards you're memorizing for your nursing exam could contain outdated drug dosages, incorrect lab values, or dangerously wrong clinical information. When patient safety is on the line, accuracy isn't optional.
home.flashcardTrust.userCreated.benefit1: Create unlimited personal flashcard decks organized by topic, body system, or exam focus area
home.flashcardTrust.userCreated.benefit2: All content verified against current clinical practice guidelines, peer-reviewed literature, and evidence-based sources
home.flashcardTrust.userCreated.benefit3: Import cards in bulk via CSV upload to quickly build decks from your lecture notes or study guides
home.flashcardTrust.userCreated.benefit4: Share verified decks with classmates or keep them private - you control visibility for every deck you create
home.flashcardTrust.userCreated.desc: Build custom flashcard decks from your own study notes and lecture content. All platform content is verified against current clinical practice guidelines and evidence-based literature. When you create your own cards, you can cross-reference them with our verified lesson content to ensure accuracy before studying.

preNursing.pageSubtitle: Build the essential knowledge you need before nursing school. Interactive visual lessons designed to make foundational concepts stick.
preNursing.subtitle: 看護プログラムを始める前に確かな基礎を築きましょう。
prenursing.cell-bio-active-transport: ATPエネルギーが必要。濃度勾配に逆らって移動。例：Na+/K+ポンプ（3 Na+出、2 K+入）。
prenursing.cell-bio-desc: 探す the building blocks of the human body through interactive diagrams and concept checks.
prenursing.cell-bio-human-cell-content: すべての細胞には、生命を維持するために協力して働くオルガネラと呼ばれる特殊な構造が含まれています。細胞構造を理解することは、疾患が細胞レベルで体にどう影響するかを理解する基礎です。
prenursing.cell-bio-human-cell-subtitle: Identify key organelles and their functions
prenursing.cell-bio-nursing-concept: 病態生理学を学ぶ際、疾患メカニズムを細胞機能障害まで追跡します。例：MIは虚血→細胞低酸素→ミトコンドリア機能不全→細胞死から始まります。
prenursing.cell-bio-passive-transport: エネルギー不要。濃度勾配に従って移動。例：拡散、浸透、促進拡散。
prenursing.cell-bio-transport-principle: 細胞膜を横切る移動は、エネルギーを投入して逆方向に移動しない限り、濃度勾配に従います。
prenursing.cell-bio-transport-subtitle: How substances move in and out of cells
prenursing.cellStructureDesc: Click each point to reveal the organelle name. Can you identify all 12?
prenursing.cellStructureLabel: 細胞構造：クリックして識別
prenursing.compensationSubtitle: 体がどのように時間を稼ぐか
prenursing.organelleExplore: 探す each organelle's structure and clinical significance
prenursing.patho-desc: 臨床医のように考えることを学びましょう：疾患メカニズムの追跡、代償の認識、初期と後期の徴候の区別。
prenursing.patho-disease-content: すべての疾患はホメオスタシスが乱される物語です。体は機能を維持するために代償しますが、最終的にそのメカニズムは失敗します。
prenursing.patho-exam-trap: 試験問題は初期（代償期）と後期（非代償期）の徴候を理解しているかをよくテストします。例：初期ショック=頻脈（代償）→後期ショック=低血圧（非代償）。
prenursing.pharm-agonist: Binds to receptor and ACTIVATES it. Mimics the natural ligand. 試験ple: Morphine (opioid agonist)
prenursing.pharm-antagonist: 受容体に結合して遮断します。天然リガンドの活性化を防ぎます。例：ナロキソン（オピオイド拮抗薬）
prenursing.pharm-desc: 薬物が受容体レベルでどのように体と相互作用するかを理解する：薬物安全の基礎。
prenursing.pharm-receptor-clinical: 薬物がアゴニストかアンタゴニストかを知ることは、治療効果と副作用の両方を予測するのに役立ちます。
prenursing.pharm-receptor-content: ほとんどの薬物は細胞上の受容体に結合して作用します。薬物-受容体相互作用が、薬物が細胞応答を活性化するか遮断するかを決定します。
prenursing.pharm-receptor-subtitle: 薬がどのようにして効果を発揮するか
prenursing.phys-desc: 体がフィードバックループ、体液管理、酸塩基調節を通じてどのようにバランスを維持するかを理解する。
prenursing.phys-ecf: 細胞外。血管内（血漿）と間質（細胞間）を含む。Na+、Cl⁻、HCO3⁻を含む。
prenursing.phys-feedback-concept: 血糖調節が典型的な例です。食事→血糖上昇→膵臓がインスリン分泌→グルコースが細胞に入る→レベル低下→インスリン分泌減少。
prenursing.phys-feedback-content: ほとんどの生理学的調節はネガティブフィードバックを使用します。体は変化を検知し、反応を活性化し、バランスを回復するために変化を元に戻します。
prenursing.phys-feedback-title: ネガティブフィードバックループ
prenursing.phys-icf: 細胞内。K+、Mg2+、PO4³⁻を含む。最大の体液区画。
prenursing.term-desc: Decode clinical language by mastering the building blocks: prefixes, suffixes, and root words.
prenursing.term-how-content: ほとんどの医学用語は、接頭辞（語頭に追加される語の部分）、語根（体の部位を特定するコア）、接尾辞（状態や処置を示す語尾）の組み合わせです。
